name: SCC - WF7 RFQ Agent (SAP Parse + Categorise + Generate)

options.systemMessage: You are a procurement categorisation assistant for Sarooj Construction Company, Oman. Return ONLY valid JSON arrays. No explanation, no markdown fences, no backticks.
You are a procurement email writer for Sarooj Construction Company, Oman. Write professional formal RFQ emails. Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown fences, no explanation, no backticks.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, rfqs: $('Build Response Payload').all().map(i => ({ rfq_id: i.json.rfq_id, rfq_reference: i.json.rfq_reference, title: i.json.title, category: i.json.category, rfq_type: i.json.rfq_type, item_count: (i.json.items || []).length, vendor_count: i.json.vendor_count, pr_numbers: [...new Set((i.json.items || []).map(x => x.pr_number).filter(Boolean))] })), pr_numbers: [...new Set($('Build Response Payload').all().flatMap(i => (i.json.items || []).map(x => x.pr_number)).filter(Boolean))] }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const groupData = $('Parse + Group by Category').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...groupData, base_seq_mr: 0, base_seq_sr: 0 } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ rfq_reference: $json.rfq_reference, rfq_type: $json.rfq_type, title: $json.title, category_detected: [$json.category], status: 'draft', created_by: $json.created_by, pr_numbers: $json.pr_numbers, sap_export_filename: $json.sap_export_filename, project_name: $json.project_name, project_code: $json.project_code, project_location: $json.project_location, client: $json.client, consultant: $json.consultant, covering_email_subject: $json.covering_email_subject, covering_email_body: $json.covering_email_body, ai_notes: $json.ai_notes }) }}

headers.user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/148.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
